description: Ask + summarize. Reading is fine in Ask mode.

seed.content:
[Current page context — applies to this user message and supersedes older page context for phrases like "this page". URL: https://www.cnn.com/2026/01/world/example-story/index.html — Title: Example story — CNN]

summarize this article

antiPatterns.reason: Reading IS permitted in Ask mode — no need to bail.

expected.successRubric: Ask mode allows read_page, extract_data, fetch_url, screenshot. Use them and summarize.
